response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ experience required for this role. While their resume shows approximately 6 months of C++ at National Instruments (2014-2015), the position requires 5-10 years of professional C++ development on Windows. Their career trajectory over the past decade has been predominantly in Node.js/TypeScript and web technologies, with no demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or financial services domains. The absence of Windows platform expertise, SQL Server/Oracle knowledge, and financial services domain exposure represents critical misalignment with core job requirements.
strengths: Senior-level developer with 15+ years of professional software engineering experience demonstrating technical depth across multiple domains
Excellent communication and mentoring abilities evidenced by multiple talks, workshops, and open-source community contributions
Some relevant technical skills including Java development, SQL familiarity, and CI/CD pipeline experience
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented C++ professional experience versus the required 5-10 years; career has focused on web/Node.js since 2014
No experience with Windows platform development; entire career centered on Linux, web services, and cloud technologies
Complete absence of capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial services domain expertise
